name: accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month, inefficient payroll tax filing causes late submissions. We automate payroll tax filing summaries instead of manual preparation of payroll tax summaries.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 payrolls/month, inefficient payroll tax filing causes late submissions. We automate payroll tax filing summaries instead of manual preparation of payroll tax summaries.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual preparation of payroll tax summaries
